Name: SampleFrameName
Description: A name for a sample frame which may be repeated to express differing names for different systems.

Name: Label
Description: A full display label for the sample frame.

Name: Description
Description: Full description of the sample frame.

Name: ValidPeriod
Description: Period for which the current version is valid.

Name: CustodianReference
Description: Organization or individual holding the rights to the frame

Name: SampleFrameAccess
Description: Provides full description of access, forms for access, contact, etc.

Name: UniverseReference
Description: A reference to the Universe of this sample frame

Name: UnitsOfFrame
Description: A sample frame may identify multiple units. One unit should be identified as the primary unit. Additional units are listed as secondary.

Name: FrameLimitations
Description: Description of general limitations of the frame, including  over/under-coverage and update schedules and procedures.

Name: AuxiliaryInformation
Description: Description of information within the frame that could support stratification, including listing of available fields.

Name: ReferencePeriod
Description: The date/period of reference for this frame

Name: UpdateProcedure
Description: Describes how this frame gets updated.

Name: SourceFrameReference
Description: A reference to a frame that this frame was derived from.
